title: Plaintext HTTP Transmission
description: Sending sensitive data (credentials, PII, session tokens) over unencrypted HTTP violates SOC2 CC6.7. All data in transit must be encrypted using TLS.

finding.message: Plaintext HTTP URL '{{token}}' found in {{file}} at line {{line}}. Use HTTPS.

references: Replace all non-localhost http:// URLs with https://.
Enforce HTTPS at the infrastructure level with HSTS headers (Strict-Transport-Security).
Use certificate pinning for mobile/desktop clients that connect to known endpoints.
Configure HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect at the load balancer or reverse proxy.
